name: Introduction to Programming
description: Fundamentals of programming using Python. Covers variables, loops, functions, OOP basics, and file handling.

name: Data Structures & Algorithms
description: Arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, graphs, sorting, and searching algorithms. Time and space complexity analysis.

name: Operating Systems
description: Process management, memory management, file systems, concurrency, deadlocks, and virtual memory.

name: Computer Networks
description: OSI model, TCP/IP, routing, switching, wireless networks, network security, and application layer protocols.

name: Machine Learning
description: Supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, SVMs, decision trees, and deep learning fundamentals.

name: Cloud Computing
description: Virtualization, containerization, AWS/Azure services, serverless computing, and cloud security.

name: Calculus I
description: Limits, continuity, differentiation, integration, and applications of calculus.

name: Linear Algebra
description: Vector spaces, matrices, eigenvalues, linear transformations, and applications in machine learning.

name: Engineering Mechanics
description: Statics and dynamics of particles and rigid bodies. Force systems, equilibrium, friction, and kinematics.

name: Thermodynamics
description: Laws of thermodynamics, heat engines, entropy, refrigeration cycles, and thermodynamic properties.

name: Basic Electrical Engineering
description: Circuit analysis, DC and AC circuits, transformers, motors, and basic electronics.

name: Digital Signal Processing
description: Discrete signals, Z-transforms, FFT, filter design, and real-time DSP applications.

name: Engineering Physics
description: Quantum mechanics, wave optics, laser physics, and semiconductor physics.

name: Introduction to Electronics
description: Semiconductor devices, diodes, transistors, amplifiers, and digital logic gates.

name: Communication Skills
description: Technical writing, presentation skills, group discussions, and interview preparation.
